questions.question: What river system flows through Tanzania, Uganda and Sudan?
What movie gave away souvenir pencils with a single commandment printed on them at its 1956 premiere?
What country suffered the slaughter of half a million Tutsis and Hutus in 1994?
What epidemic was named for the buboes, or swollen glands, that formed on a victim's neck, underarm and groin?
Whose defeat of Floyd Patterson did writer James Baldwin call "the death of boxing"?
What New York Realtor said: "I was born with a name that just sort of worked for me"?
